backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the Cleanio booking system with types for vehicle, service, and cleaning options; exposes CRUD functions to create, retrieve, update status, and assign mechanics to bookings stored in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that an admin link/button was added to the Layout component, with high confidence and a reference to the relevant file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, hooks, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, border, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Cleanio Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the tree in AdminAuthProvider, and protects /admin and /admin/bookings routes with ProtectedAdminRoute.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Password login form for the admin area featuring a show/hide toggle, inline error display on wrong password, and a loading spinner during verification using the useAdminAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Shared booking form component supporting all service types with fields for customer info, vehicle type, capacity, and time slot; builds and submits a booking to the backend including optional cleaning sub-option, then navigates to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: React component rendering a chatbot UI with message bubbles, a typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a free-text input field for the repair conversation flow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with responsive navigation links (including an Admin link) and wrapping page content in a full-height flex layout.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedAdminRo: Route guard component that renders the AdminLoginForm if the user is not authenticated, otherwise renders the protected child content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.tsx: Context-based hook providing simple password-based admin authentication with persistence via localStorage and login/logout helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider that manage Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on bookings (fetch all, fetch one, create, update status, assign mechanic) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRepairConversation: State machine hook managing a multi-step repair diagnosis chatbot conversation, tracking messages, current step, and collected issue details to build a repair summary.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defines the Cleanio brand design tokens (deep charcoal + electric orange) as CSS custom properties, and declares reusable component and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminBookingsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all bookings with status update and mechanic assignment controls, using React Query hooks to fetch and mutate booking data, protected by admin auth.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page displayed after a successful booking, showing booking ID, customer name, service type, time slot, status, and mechanic assignment info fetched via the booking ID from URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/CleaningPage.tsx: Service page for the Cleaning option that lets users choose between Colour Foam Washing (₹199) and Normal Foam Washing (₹149), displays included features, and renders the BookingForm with the selected sub-option.
frontend/src/pages/FullServicePage.tsx: Service page for Full Service that displays a checklist of included maintenance items and renders the BookingForm pre-configured for the fullService service type with capacity selector and pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, three service cards (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning) with navigation links, and a features grid highlighting doorstep service, same-day slots, certified technicians, and AI diagnostics.
frontend/src/pages/RepairPage.tsx: Renders the Repair Service page with a back button, header, AI-driven ChatBot for issue diagnosis, and a BookingForm that appears after the conversation is complete.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens (brand-orange, charcoal, semantic colors), extended border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for the Cleanio app at version 3, noting a known issue where the admin link/button is missing in production and recording the existing feature request to add it to the Layout component.
